questionEdit.editedStem: REAL011 修订后题干：已调整题干、分值、难度和来源框。

rollback: delete from review_queue_items where payload->>'questionItemId' = 'ba54f3d5-54c3-4764-b40f-87c24bb87a72' or payload->>'sourceRegionId' = '68e89c57-8fae-4a8d-833b-597e4621c8b1'; delete from question_blocks where question_item_id = 'ba54f3d5-54c3-4764-b40f-87c24bb87a72'; delete from question_items where id = 'ba54f3d5-54c3-4764-b40f-87c24bb87a72';
summaryChinese: 题干、答案、解析、题型、分值、难度和 SourceRegion bbox 均可修订，且题目与来源框修订都有 audit。
